Activity related to COBALTSTRIKE
crowdsourced_context.details: This DOMAIN is used by COBALTSTRIKE. Cobalt Strike is a comprehensive, commercial remote access tool, positioning itself as 'adversary simulation software' for executing targeted attacks and mimicking post-exploitation actions of advanced threat actors. Covering the full range of ATT&CK tactics, it integrates with tools like Metasploit and Mimikatz to enhance capabilities. While legitimate for ethical hacking with a price tag of $3,500 per user, it is also widely exploited by threat actors to conduct real attacks on organizations. Cobalt Strike is recognized as one of the most elusive and effective tools for cyber operations.
